ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"walkthrough","Summary":"Walkthrough of navigation menu and link alignment across all resort HTML pages."}
CodeContent:
"# Walkthrough - Navigation Menu & Link Alignment

We systematically aligned all navigation menus (desktop header, mobile sidebar, and footer widgets) across all 8 HTML pages in the project to point to the actual active resort pages.

## Changes Made

### Menu and Link Updates
- **Files Modified**:
  - [index.html](file:///Users/pravinsam/Desktop/resort/Source/index.html)
  - [about-us.html](file:///Users/pravinsam/Desktop/resort/Source/about-us.html)
  - [accomodations.html](file:///Users/pravinsam/Desktop/resort/Source/accomodations.html)
  - [premium-accomodations.html](file:///Users/pravinsam/Desktop/resort/Source/premium-accomodations.html)
  - [dining.html](file:///Users/pravinsam/Desktop/resort/Source/dining.html)
  - [events.html](file:///Users/pravinsam/Desktop/resort/Source/events.html)
  - [gallery.html](file:///Users/pravinsam/Desktop/resort/Source/gallery.html)
  - [contact-us.html](file:///Users/pravinsam/Desktop/resort/Source/contact-us.html)

- **Desktop Header Menu**:
  - All pages now have the exact same list of menu names and links (Home, About Resort, Accommodation, Premium Accommodation, Dining, Events, Gallery, Experience, and Contact).
  - The current page is highlighted with the `.active` class on its respective `li.menu-item`.
- **Mobile Sidebar Menu**:
  - Replaced the template's nested/child dropdowns with a clean, flat list of the 8 active resort pages.
- **Footer Resort Menu**:
  - Replaced the non-existent links (`yurts.html`, `restaurant.html`, etc.) with Accommodation, Premium Accommodation, Dining, and Events links.
- **Footer Quick Links**:
  - Aligned the Quick Links menu list items to Home, About Resort, Gallery, and Contact Us on all pages.

---

### Scripts Used
- **File Created**: [align_menus.py](file:///Users/pravinsam/.gemini/antigravity-ide/brain/353b6a43-7fa1-4a16-b18d-9ef0cd6ad7d2/scratch/align_menus.py)

<truncated 270 bytes>
Description: "Create the walkthrough.md documenting the menu alignment work."
